description: Maintenance Work Order & Logbook — creates and tracks work orders, journey log entries, and return-to-service sign-offs, solving the RAMCO triple-entry problem

hard_stops.label: No Return-to-Service Sign-off
hard_stops.logic: Maintenance work is complete but has not been signed off by an authorized person (A&P, IA, or repair station) — aircraft is not airworthy

hard_stops.label: Parts Without Documentation
hard_stops.logic: Parts were installed without serviceable tags (FAA 8130-3 or equivalent) — aircraft airworthiness is in question

hard_stops.label: Logbook Entry Incomplete
hard_stops.logic: Logbook entry is missing required fields per 14 CFR 43.9 (description of work, date, signature, certificate number)

soft_flags.label: Work Order Open Beyond SLA
soft_flags.logic: A work order has been open longer than the operator's configured SLA threshold

soft_flags.label: Parts on Backorder Affecting Dispatch
soft_flags.logic: Parts required for an open work order are on backorder and may delay aircraft return to service

soft_flags.label: Journey Log Not Completed Post-Flight
soft_flags.logic: A flight has ended but the journey log entry has not been completed by the flight crew
